kale-salad-with-pecan-vinaigrette.name: Kale Salad With Pecan Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves thinly sliced

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pecans on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool.
Transfer a handful of pecans to a cutting board and coarsely chop; set aside for serving.
Pulse garlic, oil, capers, honey, and remaining pecans in a food processor until nuts are in small pieces. Transfer to a large bowl and stir in vinegar; season dressing with salt and pepper.
Add kale and radishes to bowl with dressing; toss to coat. Taste salad and season with more salt and pepper. Top with reserved chopped pecans.

kerrys-really-lemon-pepper-marinade.name: Kerry's Really Lemon-pepper Marinade
instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Mix olive oil, soy sauce, and lemon-pepper seasoning together in a bowl.'}

kimchi-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: Kimchi Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: A half an inch of ginger
20 gr de polvo u hojuelas de pimiento rojo coreano

instructions: Para comenzar, hay que calentar el agua en una olla.

When the water breaks to boiling, we have to add the rice flour, little by little, with one hand while with the other you mix with water. Keep up with this procedure till you have mixed up all the flour and especially make sure they don't get clumsy.
Once the water and flour are mixed, add the sugar and stir up and get a smooth dough.
Luego, retira esta mezcla del calor y reserva aparte.

To continue, we have to care about the plants. First we have to wash well the onions under the cold water jet. We have to scrape him and get his roots and get him into small ruedites and put them back up for the moment.

In the case of a ginger piece, we have to start with peeling. Then we have to get them to get them very finely, with them as small as we can. Once minced, complete a tablespoon of pieces, and reserve (though you can add a little more or less to the salsa, depending on your taste).
Now we have to peel our garlic teeth. Then you can cut them into very small pieces, or even shredded them: what's easier for you. Reserve this ingredient as well.
It's time to get back to the blend of rice and sugar flour, which should have been cold a little while, to add the chili. Also add the fish sauce and mix well, till get a homogenous sauce.
Ahora, agrega el cebollino, el jengibre y el ajo a la pasta. Vuelve a mezclar.
That's all. Your kimchi sauce's ready to be used.

king-cake-in-a-bread-machine.name: King Cake In A Bread Machine

ingredients.prep: 100 to 110 degrees F/40 to 45 degrees C

instructions: Make the dough: Place sour cream, warm water, softened butter, egg, flour, sugar, salt, and yeast into a bread machine in the order listed, or follow the order recommended by the manufacturer if different. Run Dough cycle. Remove dough from the machine after the cycle is done, about 90 minutes.
Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface; roll out to a 10x28-inch rectangle.

Make the filling: Mix sugar, melted butter, and cinnamon together in a bowl. Spread mixture over dough, then sprinkle pecans over top. Starting at a long edge, roll dough over filling into a log. Transfer to a greased baking sheet with the seam facing down.
Moisten dough at each end of the log; pull ends together to form a ring and pinch to seal. Cover with a cloth and let rise in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Bake cake in the preheated oven until golden brown on top, about 15 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
While the cake is cooling, make the glaze: Combine confectioners' sugar, melted butter, and vanilla in a bowl. Stir in just enough milk to make a smooth but not watery glaze.

Spoon glaze onto warm cake, allowing it to dribble down the sides. Immediately sprinkle alternating bands of purple, green, and yellow colored sugar over glaze. Allow cake to cool completely before serving.

korean-sweet-potato-noodles-japchae.name: Korean Sweet Potato Noodles (japchae)
instructions: Combine 1/4 cup soy sauce, mirin, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, garlic, and 1 teaspoon pepper in a bowl. Add steak; stir to coat. Marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Combine 1/4 cup soy sauce, honey, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, and 1 pinch pepper in a large bowl; stir well.
Fill a large pot with water and bring to a rolling boil; stir in noodles and return to a boil. Cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes. Drain. Add noodles to sauce; toss to coat.
Whisk egg in a bowl. Heat a skillet over medium-low heat; pour in egg. Cook until firm, about 1 minute per side. Slice into strips.

Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add spinach and cook, uncovered, until just bright green, about 1 minute. Drain in a colander and immediately immerse in ice water for several minutes to stop the cooking process. Drain.

Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add carrot and onion; sauté until tender, about 5 minutes. Stir in steak and marinade; cook until tender, 5 to 8 minutes. Stir in spinach. Add noodles and egg; cook and stir until well combined and heated through, about 2 minutes.

korean-style-braised-slow-cooker-baby-ba.name: Korean-style Braised (slow Cooker) Baby Back Ribs
instructions: Wash ribs; pat dry. Liberally salt ribs.
Heat oil in a skillet over high heat. Add ribs; cook, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides, 6 to 8 minutes. Transfer to a 3-quart slow cooker.
Add onion, soy sauce, light soy sauce, rice wine, orange juice, ginger, garlic, and jalapeño to a blender; cover and blend until combined. Pour sauce over ribs; cover slow cooker.
Cook on High until meat easily pulls away from the bone, 3 to 4 hours.
Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Place ribs on a baking sheet or roasting pan.
Cook ribs under the preheated broiler until nicely charred but not burned, about 5 minutes. Garnish with scallions.

kythera-invoice-argiro.name: Kythera Invoice
instructions: For Kythira, we use pure tsipouro.
Heat the raki and pour the sparks in.
In a clean jar that closes airtightly, add the cinnamon, the carnations and, if we want, add 1 piece of citrus peel.
Seal the jar and leave it in a shade for 3-4 weeks to extract, remove the holes their perfume, taste and inense color.
In a small pot, add the sugar, add the water, mix and add to the heat.
Once it boils and melts the sugar without mixing it again, remove it.
Let the syrup cool complete.
Pour the cold syrup into the pepper with the sparks.
Mix well and seal for 1 week.
The color of Fatourada can come from light brown to deep red depending on the quality of cinnamon and the time the holes remain in the rakipouro.
Strain in clean bottles and keep it cool.
